Overview

Introduction Semantic Tokens Setup

Forms & Inputs

Input Combobox Textarea Select Checkbox Radio Group Switch Slider Label Number Input Date Picker File Input Color Picker Form

Data Display

Badge Card Icon Table Avatar Separator List Descriptions Empty State Collapsible Typography Image Tag Statistic Timeline Tree View Calendar

Feedback & Status

Toast Alert Progress Skeleton Spinner Alert Dialog

Overlays

Dialog Sheet Accordion Popover Tooltip Command Context Menu

Navigation

Tabs Dropdown Menu Breadcrumb Pagination Steps Navigation Menu Link

Actions

Button Toggle Toggle Group Button Group Toolbar

Layout

Sidebar Container Scroll Area Carousel Sortable Aspect Ratio

shadcn-html / introduction

The AI prototyping
substrate.

Semantic HTML. Themeable semantic tokens. Plain CSS components. No framework. No build step. No npm install. Just the lowest-level web primitives assembled into a system any AI can understand and build from.

View Components Get Started

Themeable

Full shadcn semantic token model. Swap a tweakcn theme and every component updates instantly.

AI Optimized

Pattern specs, not components. AI reads and builds from scratch every time.

Framework Free

Runs in any browser, zero dependencies, no build pipeline required.

The contract.

Tokens. CSS. Markup. JavaScript. Four layers — that's the whole system.

the full system 
/* 1 — semantic-tokens.css: the design system */
:root {
  --background:         oklch(1 0 0);
  --foreground:         oklch(0.145 0.005 285);
  --primary:            oklch(0.205 0.005 285);
  --primary-foreground: oklch(0.985 0.002 247);
  --border:             oklch(0.88 0.004 247);
  --radius:             0.625rem;
  --font-sans:          ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif;
  /* ...all color pairs, shadows, spacing */
}
.dark { /* same keys, dark values */ }

/* 2 — components/*.css: styled with tokens */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  font-weight: 500;
}
.btn[data-variant="default"] {
  background: var(--primary);
  color: var(--primary-foreground);
}

<!-- 3 — semantic HTML markup -->
<button class="btn" data-variant="default"
        data-dialog-trigger="confirm">
  Open Dialog
</button>

<dialog id="confirm" class="dialog">
  <div class="dialog-content">...</div>
</dialog>

// 4 — vanilla JS: wire interactivity
document.querySelectorAll('[data-dialog-trigger]')
  .forEach(btn => {
    const dialog = document.getElementById(
      btn.dataset.dialogTrigger
    );
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => dialog.showModal());
  });
